message:
fix(io): defer waker dispatch to outside lock scope in io_driver and net split halves

Clone wakers while holding the lock, then wake after the guard is
dropped. This eliminates potential deadlocks where a woken task
immediately tries to re-acquire the same mutex. Adds missing
clear_waiter_on_drop for UnixStream OwnedReadHalf/OwnedWriteHalf,
aligning with the existing TCP split implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
